title: Modern Alpha
description: Modern Alpha is a modpack that attempts to reflect the old feeling of Minecraft
body:
**Modern Alpha** is a modpack that attempts to reflect the old feeling of Minecraft

The features of this include: Old Generation (Modern Beta), old textures, and foliage (Vanilla Tweaks and PACP), No Hunger, Customised title screen, and C418 only music.

## KNOWN BUGS

Quitting a world causes the game to freeze
